name: Minsan Pa Nating Hagkan Ang Nakaraan
original_name: Minsan Pa Nating Hagkan Ang Nakaraan
overview: Prime actress Cristine Reyes and Marco Gumabao team up with the award-winning Cesar Montano in the series remake of a classic film written by Carlo J. Caparas. Fate brings past lovers Helen and Rod closer resulting to a forbidden love affair.

trailers.title: Minsan Pa Nating Hagkan Ang Nakaraan [TRAILER] starting July 25 on TV5 | Studio Viva
